metadata.title: Hono Legal - Implementation TODO
metadata.description: Comprehensive task list for completing the legal fee management system

phase.name: Critical Foundation
phase.description: Essential systems that must be completed before any other features

task.title: Setup BetterAuth Configuration
task.description: Configure BetterAuth with email/OAB login, password reset, and session management. Must support OAB number format validation (RS000000).
task.acceptance_criteria: - BetterAuth configured in src/server/auth/ - Email and OAB number login support - Password reset functionality - Session management with proper timeout - Role-based authentication (admin/user) - Rate limiting (5 attempts per minute)
task.dependencies: - Install better-auth package - Environment variables setup

task.title: Create Authentication Pages
task.description: Build login, signup, and password reset pages with proper validation and Portuguese UI.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Login page with email/OAB and password fields - "Lembrar-me" checkbox functionality - Password reset page with email/OAB input - Form validation with Portuguese error messages - Loading states and error handling - Responsive design

task.title: Implement Route Protection
task.description: Add authentication middleware and role-based access control throughout the application.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Middleware for protected routes - Admin-only route protection - Redirect to login for unauthenticated users - Session validation on all API calls - Proper error handling for unauthorized access
task.files_to_modify: - src/middleware.ts - src/server/api/trpc.ts - All API routers for authentication checks

task.title: Complete CRUD Operations - Employee Router
task.description: Add create, update, delete, and restore operations for employees with proper validation.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Create employee with email uniqueness check - Update employee profile and remuneration percentages - Soft delete with deletedAt timestamp - Restore soft-deleted employees - Admin-only restrictions for sensitive operations - Audit logging for all changes

task.title: Complete CRUD Operations - Client Router
task.description: Add create, update, delete, and restore operations for clients with CPF/CNPJ validation.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Create client with type-specific validation (PF/PJ) - CPF/CNPJ format validation and uniqueness - Update client information - Soft delete with cascade checks (no delete if has active contracts) - Contact method validation (email or phone required)

task.title: Complete CRUD Operations - Contract Router
task.description: Add create, update, delete operations for contracts with employee assignment logic.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Create contract with client and employee assignments - Support for different employee types (responsible, recommending, etc.) - Update contract status and assignments - Soft delete with revenue/fee cascade checks - Business rule validation (at least one responsible employee)

task.title: Create Revenue Router
task.description: Build complete revenue management router with all CRUD operations.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Create revenue with payment structure - Update revenue details and installment tracking - Delete revenue (check for existing fees) - List revenues with contract filtering - Validation for down payment ≤ total value

task.title: Complete Fee Router with Remuneration Logic
task.description: Add create, update, delete operations with automatic remuneration generation.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Create fee with automatic remuneration calculation - Update fee with remuneration recalculation - Soft delete fee with remuneration cascade - Business logic for different employee attribution types - Update revenue installmentsPaid counter - Bulk fee creation support

task.title: Complete Remuneration Router
task.description: Add update and delete operations for remunerations with admin restrictions.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Update remuneration amount/percentage (admin only) - Soft delete remuneration (admin only) - Get remuneration summary by employee - Get remuneration summary by date range - Recalculation when percentage changes

phase.name: User Interface Implementation
phase.description: Complete frontend implementation with forms, tables, and dashboard

task.title: Build Main Dashboard
task.description: Create comprehensive dashboard with metrics, charts, and recent activities.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Revenue summary cards with monthly comparison - Remuneration summary cards - Monthly revenue line chart (Recharts) - Revenue by type pie chart - Revenue by legal area bar chart - Recent activities table with pagination - Date range filters - Responsive design

task.title: Employee Management Forms
task.description: Create/edit employee forms with validation and role management.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Create employee modal with all fields - Edit employee modal with permission checks - Form validation with Portuguese messages - OAB number format validation - Role and type selection - Remuneration percentage inputs - Success/error notifications

task.title: Client Management Forms
task.description: Create/edit client forms with dynamic fields based on client type.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Create client modal with PF/PJ type selection - Dynamic fields based on client type - CPF/CNPJ validation and formatting - Contact method requirement validation - Edit client modal with data pre-filling - Portuguese validation messages

task.title: Contract Management Forms
task.description: Complex contract creation/editing with employee assignments and revenue setup.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Create contract modal with client selection - Employee assignment section with different roles - Revenue configuration tabs (Administrative/Judicial/Succumbency) - Process number input with validation - Legal area selection - Fee percentage configuration - Multi-step form or tabbed interface - Employee role validation rules

task.title: Fee Management Forms
task.description: Fee creation/editing forms with remuneration generation options.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Create fee modal with contract and revenue selection - Payment date picker with Portuguese locale - Currency input formatting (R$ 1.234,56) - Installment number input with validation - Generate remuneration checkbox - Bulk fee creation modal - Edit fee with remuneration impact warning

task.title: Revenue Management Forms
task.description: Revenue creation/editing forms with installment configuration.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Create revenue modal with contract selection - Revenue type selection (Administrative/Judicial/Succumbency) - Total value and down payment inputs - Payment start date picker - Installments total input - Down payment validation (≤ total value) - Edit revenue with impact warnings

task.title: Add Action Columns to All Tables
task.description: Add edit, delete, and view actions to all existing data tables.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Edit button that opens respective modal - Delete button with confirmation dialog - View details button that opens drawer - Bulk actions for applicable tables - Role-based action visibility - Loading states for actions

task.title: Create Revenue List Page and Components
task.description: Build revenue list page, table, filters, and details drawer.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Revenue list page with filters - Revenue table with contract information - Revenue details drawer - Filter by contract, type, date range - Sorting and pagination - Payment progress indicators

task.title: Implement Audit Logging
task.description: Add automatic audit logging for all CRUD operations across the system.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Audit log middleware for all mutations - Track old and new values for updates - Capture user, IP, and user agent - Audit log viewer page (admin only) - Audit log API endpoints - Performance optimization for audit writes

task.title: Contract Status Automation
task.description: Implement automatic contract status updates based on payment completion.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Auto-update contract status when all revenues paid - Business rules for status changes - Status change notifications - Manual status override capability - Status history tracking

task.title: Data Validation & Business Rules
task.description: Implement comprehensive data validation and business rule enforcement.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Revenue installment tracking validation - Contract percentage validation (0-100) - Employee assignment rule validation - Soft delete cascade rules - Data integrity constraints
task.files_to_modify: - All API routers for enhanced validation - All Zod schemas for business rules

task.title: PDF Export Functionality
task.description: Implement PDF export for reports, contracts, and remuneration summaries.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Export remuneration summaries by employee - Export contract reports - Export revenue reports - Portuguese-formatted PDFs - Proper currency and date formatting - Download progress indicators

task.title: Excel Export Functionality
task.description: Implement Excel export for data tables and reports.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Export all data tables to Excel - Filtered data export - Proper Portuguese formatting - Multiple sheets for related data - Download with proper filenames

task.title: Advanced Search & Filtering
task.description: Implement advanced search capabilities across all list pages.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Global search functionality - Advanced filters with multiple criteria - Saved search preferences - Search suggestions and autocomplete - Search history - Filter combinations
task.files_to_modify: - All filter components - All API routers for enhanced search

task.title: Notification System
task.description: Implement comprehensive notification system with Sonner.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Success notifications for all operations - Error notifications with helpful messages - Loading notifications for long operations - Portuguese notification messages - Notification history/center - Notification preferences

phase.name: Quality Assurance
phase.description: Testing, performance optimization, and quality improvements

task.title: Business Logic Unit Tests
task.description: Create comprehensive unit tests for critical business logic.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Remuneration calculation tests for all scenarios - Contract status update tests - Data validation tests - Employee assignment logic tests - Revenue/fee relationship tests - 90%+ code coverage for business logic

task.title: API Integration Tests
task.description: Create integration tests for all API endpoints.
task.acceptance_criteria: - CRUD operation tests for all entities - Authentication and authorization tests - Error handling tests - Business rule validation tests - Database transaction tests

task.title: Component Tests
task.description: Create tests for critical UI components.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Form component tests with validation - Table component tests - Modal component tests - Dashboard component tests - Authentication component tests

task.title: Database Performance Optimization
task.description: Optimize database queries and add appropriate indexes.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Database indexes for frequently queried fields - Query optimization for complex joins - Pagination optimization - Connection pooling configuration - Query performance monitoring
task.files_to_modify: - All API routers for query optimization

task.title: Frontend Performance Optimization
task.description: Optimize React components and implement performance best practices.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Component memoization where appropriate - Lazy loading for modals and heavy components - Image optimization - Bundle size optimization - React Query caching optimization
task.files_to_modify: - All React components for optimization - src/app/providers.tsx for cache configuration

task.title: Production Environment Setup
task.description: Configure production environment variables and security settings.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Environment variable validation - Security headers configuration - Database connection configuration - Email service configuration - Logging configuration - Error monitoring setup (Sentry)

task.title: Database Migration System
task.description: Set up proper database migration and seeding system.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Production-safe migration scripts - Seed data for development - Migration rollback capability - Database backup procedures - Migration testing procedures

task.title: Deployment Documentation
task.description: Create comprehensive deployment and maintenance documentation.
task.acceptance_criteria: - Deployment guide for different platforms - Environment setup instructions - Database setup and migration guide - Troubleshooting documentation - User manual in Portuguese - Admin manual for system management

summary.recommended_sequence: 1. Complete Phase 1 (Authentication + Core API) - Foundation 2. Complete Phase 2 (UI Implementation) - User functionality 3. Implement Phase 3 selectively based on business needs 4. Add Phase 4 (Testing) in parallel with development 5. Phase 5 when ready for production deployment
summary.notes: - Estimated hours are ranges accounting for complexity and potential issues - Dependencies should be respected to avoid rework - Testing should be implemented alongside features, not at the end - Regular code reviews recommended for critical tasks - Consider breaking large tasks into smaller subtasks during implementation
